title: Join Our Team
description: Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory is home to a diverse array of professionals who serve our missions and advance their careers at the same time. Learn about benefits and perks and find gateways to more information about working at the Lab.
text:
Flexible & Hybrid Work Options
The Lab is committed to supporting a hybrid work environment that meets mission, project and team needs while being flexible for your personal life and preferences. Eligible employees may choose to work on-site full time or split their time between work and an off-site location.
Alternate Work Schedules (AWS) allow Laboratory employees to compress their workweeks by working more hours over fewer days. A 4/10 schedule earns you an extra day off each week and the 9/80 option slightly extends your workday but gets you a day off every other week.
When you work is an important part of workplace flexibility. LLNL's flexible schedules enable you to start earlier in the day and leave early to pick up the kids from school or to vary the start and stop times of your workdays to help balance work and personal needs.
Flexible and Hybrid Work Resources
Hybrid Workplace Guide
Flexible Work Options
MEDICAL, DENTAL & VISION
Doing your best work is a lot easier when you feel your best. LLNL offers generously subsidized medical, dental and vision insurance to help ensure that employees—and their dependents—have the coverage they need.
Along with medical, dental and vision insurance, LLNL offers flexible spending accounts (FSAs) that can save you money on healthcare and childcare expenses. Pay on a pretax, salary-reduction basis for eligible dependent care or healthcare expenses not covered by your medical, dental or vision plans.
Insurance Resources
Medical insurance options
Dental insurance options
Vision insurance options
Dependent eligibility chart
401k WITH MATCHING
Whether you're early in your career or a seasoned pro, it's never too early to start saving for retirement.
LLNL provides an automatic employer contribution starting at 3.5% and that increases with your years of service. On top of that, we offer a full employer matching contribution up to 6% for all eligible employees.
Just as important, there's no waiting period for employer matching or vesting, so you're able to start saving for retirement as soon as your job starts.
Retirement Resources
401k plan details
Education and Training
As a "big ideas" Laboratory, we value employees' growth and learning throughout their careers.
To support that growth, we offer free online classes, in-person training opportunities, leadership training and mentoring designed to help every employee reach their fullest potential.
Individuals seeking a certificate or degree in their field may even be eligible for tuition reimbursement through our Educational Assistance Program (EAP).
Education and Training Resources
Professional development opportunities
Benefits for Parents
Taking care of kids and taking care of business can be a tough balancing act. At LLNL, we support new parents with paid parental leave and a lactation program for nursing parents returning to the Lab.
And although they're not exclusive to parents, our flexible spending accounts (FSAs) can save parents money by enabling them to set aside pre-tax dollars for childcare. Meanwhile, a flexible schedule can help parents juggle pick-up, drop-off and their jobs.
Parental Benefits Resource
2022 Maternity and paid parental leave guide
Parental leave webpage
Lactation program
Monthly parent education series
Comprehensive Wellness
We know you do your best work when body and mind are both in good shape. Our comprehensive wellness programs are designed to support employees' mental and physical health.
Along with running vaccination clinics for the flu and COVID-19, our onsite Health Services Department helps you stay healthy with ergonomic evaluations, biometric screenings and vision and hearing checks. Plus, we provide free short-term counseling services that don't drain your sick leave or vacation time.
It's easy to stay active wherever you are with virtual fitness classes like BodyPump and Yoga. Our onsite gym has a full range of exercise equipment including cardio machines and fixed and free weights. Plus, we have basketball and volleyball courts, an archery range, table tennis and more for those times when you need to get moving.
Wellness Resources
Onsite gym
Virtual fitness classes
Lab Community
At LLNL, we strive to create a culture that is inclusive, collaborative and enriching for all our employees.
Whether you're passionate about volunteering, get jazzed by inspiring STEM students or just like getting involved, there's a place for you at the Lab.
From author events to kid-friendly programming to our annual Run for HOME 5k, there are tons of ways to get involved.

Volunteering
